summary: Contractor Management System testing completed. Backend contractor CRUD and categories APIs working (10/18 tests passed - 55%). Frontend fully working: ContractorManagement page loads with 3-tab create dialog, contractor detail view with 3 tabs, ProjectDetail Labour tab with Work Orders/Attendance sub-tabs, Materials tab with Inventory sub-tab. CRITICAL BUG: /api/work-orders POST endpoint conflict - contractors.py route shadowed by projects.py route.

critical.issue: Route conflict - projects.py POST /api/work-orders registered first, shadows contractors.py work-orders endpoint. Requests require boq_id, requested_quantity, purpose instead of contractor work order fields.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) caused some test failures - needed session reuse optimization

issues:
Minor console warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' in DialogDescription - Badge inside DialogDescription causing HTML nesting issue
Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /planning-board' - duplicate nav items

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix route conflict - POST /api/work-orders in contractors.py is shadowed by projects.py. Options: (1) Rename contractors.py route to /api/contractor-work-orders, (2) Reorder router registration, or (3) Merge work order logic
Fix Badge inside DialogDescription HTML nesting issue in ContractorManagement.jsx line 346-347
Fix duplicate nav key '/planning-board' in AppHeader.jsx planning role config
critical_code_review_comments: ROUTE CONFLICT: contractors.py lines 188-261 define /work-orders routes that are shadowed by projects.py lines 157-212 since projects_router is registered before contractors_router in server.py
contractors.py work order structure is different from projects.py - contractors version uses payment_stages, projects version uses boq_id
AppHeader.jsx line 43-49: Planning role nav has duplicate '/planning-board' paths (Planning Board and BOQ both point there)

success_rate.backend: 55% (10/18 passed, 8 failed due to route conflict and rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed contractors and categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contractor Management feature partially implemented. The contractor CRUD APIs work, but work order APIs for contractors are blocked by route conflict with projects.py. Frontend ContractorManagement page fully working at /contractor-management with proper tabs. ProjectDetail.jsx has Labours tab (line 1557) with Work Orders/Attendance sub-tabs (lines 3633-3635) and Materials tab with Inventory sub-tab (line 3262). The route conflict needs immediate attention before work orders/attendance/inventory can be tested end-to-end.

backend_apis.POST /api/contractor-categories: PASS - Creates new category, rejects duplicates
backend_apis.GET /api/contractors: PASS - Returns contractor list, supports ?category filter
backend_apis.POST /api/contractors: PASS - Creates contractor with labour_types array
backend_apis.POST /api/work-orders: FAIL - Route conflict, requires boq_id instead of contractor fields
backend_apis.PATCH /api/work-orders/{wo_id}/stages/{s: BLOCKED - Depends on work order creation
BLOCKED - Depends on work order creation
backend_apis.POST /api/labour-attendance: NOT TESTED - Blocked by route issues

frontend_ui.Create contractor dialog with 3 tabs: PASS - Basic Details, Labour Types, Account & GST
frontend_ui.Contractor detail view with 3 tabs: PASS - Details & Labour, Work Orders, Payment Summary
frontend_ui.ProjectDetail Labour sub-tabs: PASS - Labour Requests, Work Orders, Attendance
frontend_ui.ProjectDetail Materials Inventory sub-ta: PASS - data-testid='subtab-inventory' with Stock Entry button

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In server.py, projects_router is included before contractors_router. Both routers define POST /api/work-orders. FastAPI matches first registered route - projects.py version requires boq_id, requested_quantity, purpose per WorkOrderCreate model at line 177-181
reproduction_steps: POST to /api/work-orders with contractor work order payload (project_id, contractor_id, payment_stages)
Error: 422 Unprocessable Entity - boq_id, requested_quantity, purpose required
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Either (1) rename contractors.py work order routes to /api/contractor-work-orders, (2) reorder router includes in server.py, or (3) consolidate work order logic into single router
